ddls:
CREATE TABLE "existing_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each existing product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the existing product */,
  "core_features" TEXT /* Core features present in the existing product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was released */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_under_consideration" (
  "puc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product under consideration */,
  "puc_name" TEXT /* Name of the product under consideration */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features being proposed for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product under consideration */,
  "proposed_release_date" TEXT /* Proposed release date for the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product under consideration (e.g., in planning, under review) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the product under consideration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature evaluation record */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Scenario ID related to the evaluation process */,
  "existing_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the existing product being evaluated */,
  "ep_num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the existing product */,
  "ep_features" TEXT /* Features present in the existing product */,
  "puc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product under consideration */,
  "puc_num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the product under consideration */,
  "puc_features" TEXT /* Features in the product under consideration */,
  "increment" TEXT /* Incremental feature being evaluated for the product */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_evaluation_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_evaluation_existing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("existing_product_id") REFERENCES existing_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_evaluation_puc_id FOREIGN KEY ("puc_id") REFERENCES product_under_consideration ("puc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the metric in the overall evaluation */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the metric that must be met for a feature to be considered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being assessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used for evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for the feature based on the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES feature_evaluation ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES feature_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the evaluation process */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation related to the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the feature before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the feature after the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES feature_evaluation ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the requested feature */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, reviewed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature request */,
  "requested_feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requested feature */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
